infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to the camera to take photos of dishes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select dish images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save QR codes to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Restaurant Admin to access your photos to upload dish images.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Restaurant Admin to use the camera to take dish photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Restaurant Admin to save menu images to your gallery.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Restaurant Admin to save menu images to your gallery.
